description: Los Ardillos is a Mexican criminal group based in the La Montaña region of Guerrero, founded around 2000 by Celso Ortega Rosas and his sons. It engages in drug trafficking, extortion, and kidnapping, and has been a major source of violence in the region, particularly targeting indigenous communities. The group was initially allied with the Beltrán Leyva Cartel and later became involved in a violent conflict with the Cártel de los Rojos. Despite the arrest and subsequent killing of its founder, the group remains active.
